title: Strict autonomous QA master protocol
description: Define mandatory QA lifecycle, severity system, evidence rules, and completion guardrails.
notes: Live usage begins when Codex applies this to actual tasks.

title: Image generation visual review protocol
description: Provide strict image realism/anatomy/compliance review criteria.
notes: Awaiting runtime application on generated images.

title: Video generation review protocol
description: Provide temporal consistency and motion realism review criteria.
notes: Awaiting runtime application on generated videos.

title: Audio generation review protocol
description: Provide speech/audio technical and content review criteria.
notes: Awaiting runtime application on generated audio.

title: Multimodal artifact review scorecard
description: Standardize cross-modality scoring and approval logic.
notes: To be filled in during actual reviews.

title: ComfyUI workflow testing protocol
description: Define workflow static inspection, runtime validation, and reproducibility checks.
notes: Workflow templates exist but local ComfyUI runtime is absent; runtime execution requires EC2 or local runtime installation.

title: Model/LoRA/checkpoint validation protocol
description: Define integrity, compatibility, load, and sample-output validation.
notes: No local model binaries were found; actual model verification remains runtime-dependent.

title: Prompt/negative prompt QA protocol
description: Define prompt clarity, contradiction, contamination, and test-output evaluation.
notes: Prompt approval still needs representative runs when used.

title: Failure classification and retest protocol
description: Prevent looping and require disciplined retry tracking.
notes: Applies on first runtime failure onward.

title: Done certification and evidence protocol
description: Define final completion gate and evidence bundle requirements.
notes: Required before marking future work done.

title: QA templates/schemas/scripts
description: Provide reusable QA records, checklists, schemas, and helper scripts.
notes: Local scripts/templates/schemas validated; sample QA record and done certification generated under QA evidence.
